text: Being here, I am surrounded by the aura of innovation and inquiry. The space pulses with the essence of human curiosity and ambition, as if the walls themselves are repositories of collective thought. The exhibition urges me to ponder our evolving relationship with technology—how we shape it, and in turn, how it shapes us. I feel a subtle awe, aware of both the promise and paradox of progress, and a quiet excitement at the possibilities that lie within our continual quest to connect, create, and coexist with the intelligent things we birth.
